close_reason: Blocked on upstream: wolfhsm crate doesn't support TLS transport yet. Nothing to implement.
description: Blocked on wolfssl-rs-h77b. Once wolfhsm has Transport::Tls, add a tls: prefix to make_transport() (e.g. ?server=tls:host:8080) and forward a tls feature flag. Will need URI params for CA cert, client cert/key paths, and server hostname.
title: secretx-wolfhsm: add TLS transport once wolfhsm crate supports it
